problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering may resolve What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 17 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
